title: Zombie Rush
description: An intense action survival game. Survive waves of the undead by maneuvering and clearing out hordes of zombies.
controls: W, A, S, D or Arrow keys to move, Aim and Shoot with Mouse.

title: Stickman Clash
description: A thrilling stickman combat arena game. Fight epic battles, utilize advanced weaponry, and defeat all opponents to become the ultimate stickman warrior.
controls: WASD / Arrow Keys to Move, Click / Tap to Attack, Space / Special Keys for items.

title: Ragdoll Archers
description: An epic physics-based stickman archery battle. Aim carefully, calculate flight trajectories, upgrade arrows, and defeat enemies in multiple game modes.
controls: Mouse / Touch to drag and aim, Release to fire.

title: Rooftop Snipers
description: A chaotic two-player pixel physics shooter. Jump and shoot to push your opponent off the roof before they do the same to you!
controls: Player 1: W to jump, E to shoot. Player 2: I to jump, O to shoot.

title: Kick the Buddy
description: Interactive toy-bashing stress reliever. Explode, destroy, fire, shoot, smash, and freeze elements to kick the buddy to your heart's content!
controls: Click or tap and drag to throw/smash, select weapons from the menu to interact.

title: Western Sniper
description: Become a legendary sniper in the Wild West. Take aim, take cover, eliminate outlaws, and bring order back to the dusty frontier towns.
controls: Move mouse or swipe to aim, release or click to fire. Take cover automatically.

title: Cars Arena
description: High-octane vehicular survival battle. Drive, drift, smash opponents, and stay on the arena tiles as the hex ground disintegrates under your tires!
controls: WASD / Arrow Keys or Mouse to steer and accelerate. Space to jump.

title: Tag
description: Multiplayer playground game of chase. Dodge, run, jump over obstacles, and tag other players in vibrant platforms and maps.
controls: Arrow keys or WASD to run and jump. Reach other players to tag them.

title: Subway Surfers
description: The ultimate endless runner! Dash as fast as you can, dodge oncoming trains, and escape from the grumpy inspector and his dog.
controls: Left / Right Arrows to change lanes, Up Arrow to jump, Down Arrow to slide.

title: Space Waves
description: Test your reflexes in this high-speed geometric wave-riding game. Navigate dangerous neon obstacle courses in deep space.
controls: Click or press Spacebar / Up Arrow to steer the wave upwards, release to let it glide down.

title: Level Devil
description: Don't trust the floor! This unblocked troll platformer is filled with hidden spikes, collapsing tiles, and surprising traps that keep you guessing.
controls: WASD or Arrow keys to move and jump.

title: Blumgi Ball
description: An engaging physics-puzzle sports game where you aim, shoot, and teleport to solve levels and dunk the ball.
controls: Click and drag to aim, release to shoot. Click/tap again to teleport to the ball.

title: Tunnel Rush
description: Buckle up and get ready to fly through ultra-speed 3D neon tunnels, dodging spinning blocks and shifting hazards.
controls: Left / Right Arrow Keys or A / D to rotate left and right.

title: Getting Over It
description: A high-friction climbing puzzle. Command a massive hammer with your mouse to scale an impossibly steep mountain.
controls: Use mouse/touch to rotate hammer, hooking it onto obstacles to lift yourself.

title: Stickman Hook
description: Swing like a spider! Use grappling hooks to soar through levels, bouncing off bumpers and executing acrobatic flips.
controls: Click or press Spacebar to hook and swing, release to let go and soar.

title: Bloxd.io
description: Jump into an immersive multiplayer voxel arena! Enjoy varied block-building, survival, and parkour modes with online players.
controls: WASD to move, Space to jump, Shift to run, Mouse to build/break.

title: Basket Random
description: A wacky two-player ragdoll basketball game where physics are chaotic and every round brings random courts, players, and balls.
controls: Press W or Up Arrow to jump and shoot.

title: Screw Out: N&B
description: Unscrew nuts and bolts, solve intricate puzzles, and free the plates in this ultra-satisfying mechanical brain-teaser!
controls: Click or tap on a screw to select and unscrew it, then click on an empty screw hole to place it.

title: Tank Stars
description: Choose the right weapon, aim with precision, and unleash powerful missiles to blow up your opponent's tanks in explosive turn-based battles.
controls: Use touch or mouse dragging to adjust shooting angle and power, then tap/click fire. Use controls to position your tank.

title: Fragen
description: Test your speed and combat intelligence in a frantic battle of answers. Keep your reflexes sharp to survive the onslaught.
controls: Mouse or Keyboard keys as instructed on screen to answer questions and combat enemies.

title: Ragdoll Hit
description: A physics-based ragdoll fighter! Launch punches, kicks, and weapon attacks with dramatic physical interactions.
controls: WASD or Arrow keys to lean, punch, and kick. Click/tap physical buttons for custom attacks.
